Petition to Protect Veterans and Armed Forces Railcards During a recent Railway Bill Committee, Labour MPs voted against putting the Veterans Railcard and Armed Forces Railcard into law. The Government argued it... What do you think I should ask the Prime Minister? My role as your Member of Parliament is to represent your views and speak out on the matters you care about. In Prime Minister's Questions every Wednesday... Residents' Survey I want to make sure that I understand what matters most to you so that I can represent your views at home in Bridlington and The Wolds, as well as in Parliament... Would you like a Marks & Spencer in Driffield? It's been reported that Marks & Spencer is looking to expand its food hall offering across Britain, with Driffield listed as a potential location. I want to get... Local Pub of the Year Competition 2025 VOTING NOW CLOSED - See the results here !
